testcase.name: test_request_no_auth

failure.message:

testcase.failure:
def test_request_no_auth(): > res = no_auth_client.list_users() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests/base/test_client.py:284: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ rest_client/base/util.py:18: in wrapper return function(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests/base/test_client.py:19: in list_users return self._request(kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ self = , data = {} args = (), kwargs = {} request_config = RequestConfig(path='users', name='list_users', method='GET', options=None) res = response = b'Just a moment...Just a moment...

def test_register_user_post(): > res = no_auth_client.register_user(email="eve.holt@reqres.in", password="pistol") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests/base/test_client.py:294: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ rest_client/base/client.py:107: in wrapper return self.method_template(self.endpoints.get(item))(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ rest_client/base/client.py:118: in fn return self._request(kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ self = data = {'email': 'eve.holt@reqres.in', 'password': 'pistol'}, args = () kwargs = {} request_config = RequestConfig(path='register', name='register_user', method='POST', options=) res = response = b'Just a moment...Just a moment...
